snippet.description:

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

snippet.title: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 | Official Teaser 2
snippet.description:
Look alive, choom — Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 is coming your way this Fall!

Gear up for a return to the world of Cyberpunk, where only the ruthless survive and one wrong move can get you flatlined. This standalone story throws a fresh cast of characters into the darkest corners of Night City and brings a raw, gritty take on the world of the future. Lawless and unforgiving, this is Night City at its most brutal. 

Brought to you by CD PROJEKT RED and TRIGGER, Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 is directed by Kai Ikarashi (Cyberpunk: Edgerunners, SSSS.Gridman), with Kanno Ichigo (Promare, Cyberpunk: Edgerunners) as the lead designer and Hugo Award winner Bartosz Sztybor as showrunner, story writer, and producer.

TRAILER MUSIC
Original Score by Tsuneo Imahori
“You Can't Run From Me” — written by Maria Kelly and Drew Polovick, performed by Rico Nasty, produced by Drew Polovick, mixed and mastered by Elliot Polokoff

Coming to Netflix, Fall 2026. 

Stay connected:
cyberpunk.net/edgerunners2
x.com/edgerunners
facebook.com/edgerunners
instagram.com/Edgerunners

Want to experience Night City on a deeper level? Play Cyberpunk 2077 and carve your own path through the dark future.

snippet.title: 给阿嬷的情书 ｜ Dear You | Official Trailer | 官方预告片
snippet.description:
《给阿嬷的情书》官方预告片释出 💌 全马GSC戏院6月18日上映！🇲🇾

“侨批”，是远赴南洋谋生的先辈们，寄回家乡的一封封家书与汇款。

它不仅承载着思念，更维系着漂泊异乡的人与故土亲人的牵挂。

那个没有即时通讯的年代，
最深的爱，从不挂在嘴边。
而是把辛苦攒下的血汗钱和一句“平安”，
装进信里，跨越山海寄回家。

#给阿嬷的情书 📪 纸短情长，唯爱不变
6月18日 全马GSC戏院上映 #做人有情有义 ❤️

💌 The Official Trailer for “Dear You” is Out! In GSC starting 18 June!🇲🇾

“Qiaopi” refers to letters and remittances sent home by early ancestors who journeyed to Nanyang.

More than just words on paper, they carried the weight of endless longing, anchoring those who were drifting in a foreign land to the loved ones they left behind.

In an era without instant messaging, the deepest love was never spoken aloud. Instead, it was hidden in hard-earned money, and a simple reassurance of “I am safe” sealed inside an envelope and sent across mountains and oceans, all the way back home.

📪 Letters may be short, but love never is.
#DearYou in GSC starting 18 June. 🤍

#电影给阿嬷的情书 #給阿嬤的情書

snippet.title: THE ONE PIECE | Official Teaser | Netflix
snippet.description:
Eiichiro Oda’s manga "THE ONE PIECE" (originally serialized in Shueisha’s Weekly Shonen Jump in Japan) has become a cultural phenomenon with fans all around the globe, and now, it is being adapted as a new anime series, starting from the initial East Blue Saga. Produced by WIT Studio, giving viewers an opportunity to experience the adventures of Monkey D. Luffy and his Straw Hat Pirates by fully tapping into the expressive potential of modern technology to tell the story in a way that feels familiar yet fresh.
Streaming only on Netflix, February 2027.
#THEONEPIECE

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81594317

snippet.title: ROBLOX ANIMAL HOSPITAL..
snippet.description:
Today I worked the night shift at an animal hospital! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn
